name: loop-engineer
description: Loop engineering wizard for Claude Code. Answer 2 questions and Claude orchestrates a self-assembling, fully autonomous 9-agent team (resource-scout, researcher, planner, agent-factory, executor, evaluator, verifier, auditor, memory-keeper) until your goal is met — for any domain, not just code.
